understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` on each level without landing on spike tiles (`u`/`v`), completing levels efficiently within the attempt/turn limits.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose an action: MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT shifts the player one tile horizontally, then gravity automatically carries the player in the current gravity direction until they land on a solid/support tile, hit a hazard (spikes end the run), or reach the goal. CLICK targets a specific coordinate to remove a breakable/clickable block (`x`) to open or change fall paths and does not move the player directly. UNDO reverts the previous action to recover from a bad move/click. Planning relies on the landing previews (`left_landing`/`right_landing`) and corridor scan to find safe passages to new vertical sections.

understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` on each level without landing on spike tiles (`u`/`v`), completing levels efficiently within the attempt/turn limits.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose an action: MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT shifts the player one tile horizontally, then gravity automatically carries the player in the current gravity direction until they land on a solid/support tile, hit a hazard (spikes end the run), or reach the goal. CLICK targets a specific coordinate to remove a breakable/clickable block (`x`) to open or change fall paths and does not move the player directly. UNDO reverts the previous action to recover from a bad move/click. Planning relies on the landing previews (`left_landing`/`right_landing`) and corridor scan to find safe passages to new vertical sections.
